title: Register a corporate agent
description: Register or update the details of an agent acting for a Barbadian company.
summary: Companies registered with CAIPO can appoint an agent to act on their behalf. The agent is the person CAIPO will contact about the company – for example, to send reminders for annual returns or to confirm changes.

Use the Registered Agent Application Form to register a new agent for the first time, to change the agent for a company, or to update the agent’s details. Most law firms and corporate services providers in Barbados act as registered agents for the companies they look after.
The form is short. You give the agent number (if you already have one), the agent’s name, address, phone, fax and email, and the company they will be representing.
Bring a letter of authority from the company confirming that they have appointed the agent. Without that, CAIPO will not record the change.

items: the agent number, if you have one
the agent’s name, address, phone number, fax and email
the name and number of the company the agent is acting for

items.name: Letter of authority from the company

how_long: Updates are usually recorded within 5 working days.

options.heading: In person
content: Take the completed Registered Agent Application Form to the Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office at Baobab Tower, Warrens.

contact.agency: Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office (CAIPO)
contact.address:
Baobab Tower, Ground Floor
Warrens
St. Michael

assumptions: ‘Updates are usually recorded within 5 working days’ is an estimate.
‘There is no fee’ is inferred from the form not stating one.
